properties.titulo_evento: Trump: Latest strikes on Iran ‘in honour’ of killed US military personnel
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump said the latest strikes on Iran were carried out 'in honour' of killed US military personnel.

properties.titulo_evento: US releases footage of ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: The US military carried out its ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentinians show pride in Buenos Aires despite World Cup final defeat
properties.descricao: Argentinians filled the streets of Buenos Aires to honour their team despite its World Cup final defeat.

properties.titulo_evento: Palestinians celebrate Spain’s World Cup victory
properties.descricao: Palestinians across Gaza and the Occupied West Bank celebrated Spain’s World Cup victory.

properties.titulo_evento: Mbappe takes home second Golden Boot, Spain sweeps World Cup awards
properties.descricao: While Ferran Torres orchestrated Spain's winning the ultimate prize, his teammates walk away with awards of their own.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US military completes ninth night of strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: US forces attack Iran for ninth consecutive night as one US soldier killed in northern Iraq.

properties.titulo_evento: US soldier killed in Iraq during ‘controlled detonation’ of Iranian drone
properties.descricao: The death brings the number of US soldiers killed since the start of the US-Israel war on Iran to 17.

properties.titulo_evento: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
properties.descricao: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.

properties.titulo_evento: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
properties.descricao: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are innocent.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
properties.descricao: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
properties.descricao: He was arrested in 2021 during Cuba's largest anti-government protests in decades and spent five years ⁠in prison.

properties.titulo_evento: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
properties.descricao: Russians have been hit by mobile internet shutdowns and more businesses are seeking to dodge tax after more than four years of war with Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Madrid fans react to Spain's World Cup win
properties.descricao:
Fans in #Madrid celebrated #Spain's second #WorldCup title win.
 
Luis de la #Fuente's #Roja beat #Argentina 1-0 in Sunday's final, with Ferran Torres' clinical finish in the extra period.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East live: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards say they hit US military targets in Kuwait
properties.descricao: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they hit US military targets in Kuwait on Monday, including an early-warning radar system that they alleged had been "completely destroyed" in a statement reported by state news agency IRNA. Kuwait later said that it...

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup 2026: Spain crowned champions after extra-time thriller against Argentina
properties.descricao: Spain were crowned world champions for the second time in their history on Sunday, defeating defending champions Argentina 1-0 after extra time at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. Ferran Torres' decisive strike in extra time settled a tightly conteste...

properties.titulo_evento: US announces death of another service member, Jordan summons Iranian envoy over attacks
properties.descricao: A US service member died during a "controlled detonation" of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq, the military said Sunday. It followed the killing of two US troops in Jordan late Friday. Jordan on Sunday summoned Iran's...

properties.titulo_evento: Israel says Iran missile towards Jordan's Aqaba intercepted
properties.descricao: Israeli and Jordanian forces on Sunday intercepted an Iranian missile aimed at the Jordanian city of Aqaba,  the Israeli military said. Reporting from Israel, FRANCE 24's Noga Tarnopolsky explains that Israel was hit by sharpnel from the interceptio...

properties.titulo_evento: Spain-Argentina: La Roja claim second World Cup title in extra time
properties.descricao: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in extra time at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey to win the World Cup, completing a historic Euro-World Cup double. Ferran Torres' late strike sealed victory for a dominant Spanish side against a 10-man Argentina, ending L...

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup Final: La Roja, La Albiceleste battle for glory
properties.descricao: La Roja's patient possession game meets the Albiceleste's trademark resilience in the World Cup final in New York on Sunday. As Spain coach Luis de la Fuente and his former coaching student Lionel Scaloni, now Argentina's manager, prepare to face of...

properties.titulo_evento: Russia hits Kyiv with ballistic missiles
properties.descricao: Russia has launched one of its largest ballistic missile attacks of the conflict in Ukraine. At least one person was killed and 16 others were injured after around two dozen ballistic missiles struck Kyiv overnight. Witnesses described charred apart...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US conducts strikes for 9th night in a row
properties.descricao: The US launched another wave of attacks against Iran, this time reportedly hitting targets in the northwestern city of Tabriz and elsewhere. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: New Bundesliga TV deal in US prioritizes reach over money
properties.descricao: The Bundesliga has a new home on American screens after Germany's top football league left ESPN. The new deal is a sign of the times.

properties.titulo_evento: Algeria seeks larger EU energy role amid regional tensions
properties.descricao: Algeria and Germany agreed to deepen energy ties during President Abdelmadjid Tebboune's recent visit to Berlin. But Algiers is still grappling with tensions at home, over Western Sahara and instability in the Sahel.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia's largest ballistic assault of war rocks Kyiv
properties.descricao: Fires broke out across the Ukrainian capital after Russia's latest missile attack, which used the highest number of ballistic missiles of the war so far. Several people have been injured in Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Andrew Tate, brother arrested in Miami, UK seeks extradition
properties.descricao: Andrew and Tristan Tate were taken into custody by the US Marshals Service in Miami on a sealed warrant. The UK has requested their extradition on charges that include trafficking and rape.

properties.titulo_evento: Zoya and the crew answer your questions

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran trade strikes again as Washington avenges American deaths
properties.descricao: Tehran hit Gulf states hosting American troops, while Washington said its bombing would "swiftly punish" Iran for killing two U.S. soldiers.

properties.descricao: Brent crude, the global benchmark for oil, rose more than 3 percent as trading resumed on Sunday, while S&P 500 futures remained essentially unchanged.

properties.descricao: The Trump administration has recently sought to scale back sanctions as adversaries develop workarounds that some believe could erode the U.S. dollar’s supremacy.
